assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-25: '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with rows '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-33: '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-37: '## Code Intelligence' section states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and includes a concrete example: 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 48: '### Limitations' subheading appears under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 35), followed by 'No limitations known -- no Serena instances reported issues.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 10-13: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances by scanning for `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern: 1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools: mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol... 2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools: mcp__serena_ui__find_symbol...'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added -- pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md: Under 'Preserved (existing content)': '# my-project', '## Documentation', '## Getting Started'. Under 'Added (new content)': '## Repository Registry (new)', '## Jira Configuration (new)', '## Code Intelligence (new)', '## Bug Configuration (new)', '## Hierarchy Configuration (new)'. All four required Project Configuration sections marked as new.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path -- matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 22: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' -- exact column names match the required structure.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline -- outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
